title: 2-column content block
metaTitle: Build a two-column content email partial
description: Show two side-by-side content blocks with images, text, and CTA links.
extendedDescription: Use this partial to compare two announcements, features, recommendations, or resources in a single email section. It pairs each item with its own image, heading, body copy, and CTA link while preserving responsive email markup.

defaultValues.block_1_paragraph_text: Start with a prebuilt content block, then customize the copy, image, and link.
defaultValues.block_2_paragraph_text: Pair each message with a clear CTA so readers know where to go next.

block_1_image.label: Block 1 image
block_1_image.description: Image shown above the first content block.

block_1_header_text.label: Block 1 header text
block_1_header_text.description: Heading shown below the first image.

block_1_paragraph_text.label: Block 1 paragraph text
block_1_paragraph_text.description: Paragraph-style text shown below the first heading.
block_1_paragraph_text.default: Start with a prebuilt content block, then customize the copy, image, and link.
block_1_paragraph_text.placeholder: Start with a prebuilt content block, then customize the copy, image, and link.

block_1_cta_text.label: Block 1 CTA text
block_1_cta_text.description: Linked CTA text for the first block.

block_1_cta_url.label: Block 1 CTA link
block_1_cta_url.description: Destination URL for the first block CTA.

block_2_image.label: Block 2 image
block_2_image.description: Image shown above the second content block.

block_2_header_text.label: Block 2 header text
block_2_header_text.description: Heading shown below the second image.

block_2_paragraph_text.label: Block 2 paragraph text
block_2_paragraph_text.description: Paragraph-style text shown below the second heading.
block_2_paragraph_text.default: Pair each message with a clear CTA so readers know exactly where to go next.
block_2_paragraph_text.placeholder: Pair each message with a clear CTA so readers know exactly where to go next.

block_2_cta_text.label: Block 2 CTA text
block_2_cta_text.description: Linked CTA text for the second block.

block_2_cta_url.label: Block 2 CTA link
block_2_cta_url.description: Destination URL for the second block CTA.

title: Approve and reject buttons
metaTitle: Build approve and reject email buttons
description: Add paired approve and reject buttons to decision-focused emails.
extendedDescription: Use this partial to give recipients two clear choices from a single email. It works well for review flows, access requests, moderation queues, and any workflow where users need to approve or reject an item.
htmlContent: {{ approve_text }} {{ reject_text }}

approve_url.label: Approve URL
approve_url.description: The destination URL for the approve button.

approve_text.label: Approve text
approve_text.description: The label displayed on the approve button.

reject_url.label: Reject URL
reject_url.description: The destination URL for the reject button.

reject_text.label: Reject text
reject_text.description: The label displayed on the reject button.

title: Author block
metaTitle: Build an author block email partial
description: Display author information with avatar, name, title, and signoff.
extendedDescription: Add a professional author signature block to your emails with avatar image, name, title, signoff message, and email address. Perfect for personalized transactional emails and newsletters.
htmlContent:
{% if author_image.url %}
{% endif %} {% if signoff %}

{{ author_name }}
{% endif %} {% if author_title %}
{{ author_title }}
{% endif %} {% if author_email %}

{% endif %}

title: Button with UTM link
metaTitle: Build a button with UTM link email partial
description: Create trackable links with UTM parameters for campaign analytics.
extendedDescription: Automatically append UTM parameters (source, medium, campaign, term, content) to your links for accurate campaign tracking in analytics tools. Essential for measuring email campaign performance.
htmlContent:
{%- assign params = '' -%} {%- if utm_source != '' and utm_source -%}{%- assign params = params | append: 'utm_source=' | append: utm_source -%}{%- endif -%} {%- if utm_medium != '' and utm_medium -%}{%- if params != '' -%}{%- assign params = params | append: '&' -%}{%- endif -%}{%- assign params = params | append: 'utm_medium=' | append: utm_medium -%}{%- endif -%} {%- if utm_campaign != '' and utm_campaign -%}{%- if params != '' -%}{%- assign params = params | append: '&' -%}{%- endif -%}{%- assign params = params | append: 'utm_campaign=' | append: utm_campaign -%}{%- endif -%} {%- if utm_term != '' and utm_term -%}{%- if params != '' -%}{%- assign params = params | append: '&' -%}{%- endif -%}{%- assign params = params | append: 'utm_term=' | append: utm_term -%}{%- endif -%} {%- if utm_content != '' and utm_content -%}{%- if params != '' -%}{%- assign params = params | append: '&' -%}{%- endif -%}{%- assign params = params | append: 'utm_content=' | append: utm_content -%}{%- endif -%} {%- assign final_url = button_url -%} {%- if params != '' -%} {%- if button_url contains '?' -%} {%- assign final_url = button_url | append: '&' | append: params -%} {%- else -%} {%- assign final_url = button_url | append: '?' | append: params -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endif -%}
{{ button_text }}

button_url.label: Button URL
button_url.description: The destination URL for the button.

button_text.label: Button Text
button_text.description: The label displayed on the button.

utm_source.label: UTM Source
utm_source.description: Identifies which site sent the traffic (e.g. newsletter, google).

utm_term.label: UTM Term
utm_term.description: Paid keyword term for the campaign.

utm_content.label: UTM Content
utm_content.description: Differentiates ads or links pointing to the same URL.

title: Numbered list
metaTitle: Build a numbered list email partial
description: Show ordered steps, requirements, or recommendations in email.
extendedDescription: Use this partial to render up to five ordered items with numbered badges and consistent spacing. It helps teams add structured instructions, onboarding tasks, and ranked recommendations without rebuilding table-based email markup.
htmlContent:
{%- if list_item_1 != '' and list_item_1 -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if list_item_2 != '' and list_item_2 -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if list_item_3 != '' and list_item_3 -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if list_item_4 != '' and list_item_4 -%} {%- endif -%} {%- if list_item_5 != '' and list_item_5 -%} {%- endif -%}
1

2
{{ list_item_2 }}
3
{{ list_item_3 }}
4
{{ list_item_4 }}
5
{{ list_item_5 }}

defaultValues.list_item_2: Add the channels your users prefer
defaultValues.list_item_3: Test the template with sample data

title: Task item
metaTitle: Build a task item email partial
description: Display a single task item with title, status, and metadata.
extendedDescription: Render individual task items in notification emails for productivity and collaboration apps. Shows task details in a clean, structured format that matches your app's design.
htmlContent:
✓
{{ name | truncate: 35 }} {% assign task_date_unix = date | date: "%s" %} {% assign current_date_unix = "now" | date: "%s" %} {% if task_date_unix < current_date_unix %} {% else %} {% endif %}
{{ date | date: "%b %d" }} {{ date | date: "%b %d" }}

title: Testimonial with large avatar
description: Show social proof with a quote and image.
extendedDescription: Show social proof with a quote and image.
htmlContent:
{{ quote }}

{{ name }}

{{ title }}

defaultValues.quote: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like.
defaultValues.name: Steve Jobs
defaultValues.title: Co-founder of Apple

image_url.label: Avatar image
image_url.description: The large avatar or photo displayed on the left side of the testimonial

quote.label: Quote
quote.default: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like.

name.label: Name
name.description: Full name of the person giving the testimonial

title.label: Title
title.description: Job title or company of the person giving the testimonial

title: TLDR callout block
metaTitle: Build a TLDR callout email partial
description: Highlight a short summary or key takeaway in an email.
extendedDescription: Use this partial to give readers a focused summary before they read the rest of an email. It supports a heading, paragraph text, and color treatment so teams can match the callout to the message context.

defaultValues.paragraph_text: We shipped several updates to help you get started with Knock faster.

header_text.label: Header text
header_text.description: The H1-style heading shown at the top of the callout.

paragraph_text.label: Paragraph text
paragraph_text.description: The paragraph-style summary text shown below the heading.
paragraph_text.default: Add a concise summary of the most important takeaway here.

color.label: Color
color.description: Choose the color treatment for the callout container.

title: Video cover image
metaTitle: Build a video cover image email partial
description: Add a clickable video thumbnail with play icon overlay to emails.
extendedDescription: Use this partial to turn a static image into a video teaser in your email layout. It overlays a play icon, supports responsive behavior, and links users to your hosted video or landing page.

cover_image.label: Cover image
cover_image.description: Upload or provide the URL for the video cover image.

optional_link.label: Optional link
optional_link.description: Fallback destination URL used when no image action is set.
